content:
## Quick Start

### Option 1: Devcontainer (recommended)

Open in GitHub Codespaces, VS Code Dev Containers, or DevPod:

[![Open in GitHub Codespaces](https://github.com/codespaces/badge.svg)](https://codespaces.new/anthropics/corvia-workspace)


### Option 2: Local

```bash
git clone https://github.com/anthropics/corvia-workspace
cd corvia-workspace
corvia workspace init    # clones repos, provisions Ollama
corvia workspace ingest  # indexes both repos (or use pre-ingested knowledge)
corvia serve --mcp &     # start server
corvia search "how does chunking work"
```
